title: Respawn Animals
description: Naturally spawned animals respawn after death
body:
![Respawn Animals Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LlTjeGHl/images/0f5194d3aa754d90951521630c14da4707452030.png)

This Mod works simply. Whenever a world-spawned animal is killed, it will respawn after a while in a location close to its death. If you don't want the animal to return, have the Amulet of Souls in your inventory.


### **FAQ:**
<details>
<summary>Click to see!</summary>

- Does it work with animals from other mods?</br>
       Yes, however, if the creator does not define the entity as an animal, problems may arise.

- Does it work with aggressive entities?</br>
       No.
 
- If the chunk is not loaded will the animal respawn?</br>
       Yes.

- Do animals generated by breeding respawn?</br>
       No, only naturally generated animals.

</details>


### **Settings:**
<details>
<summary>Click to see!</summary>

Local: your_game_directory/config/respawn_animals.json

- days_for_respawn_animal:</br>
       Defines how long it will take for the animal to respawn (0.5 is equal to one night or day).

- mobs_black_list:</br>
       put here all the animals you don't want to respawn.

</details>
